holdings.infoBox: QYLG is an equity ETF with a total of 103 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.08%, Apple at 7.06%, Micron Technology at 5.26%, Microsoft at 4.57%, and Amazon.com at 4.14%.

overview.description: The Global X Nasdaq 100 Covered Call & Growth ETF (QYLG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Cboe Nasdaq 100 Half BuyWrite V2 index. The fund tracks an index that holds Nasdaq 100 stocks and sells call options on half the value of those stocks, to collect the premiums and allow for growth. QYLG was launched on Sep 18, 2020 and is issued by Global X.
infoTable: Cboe Nasdaq 100 Half BuyWrite V2 Index
